scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @repohelm/core build && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter @repohelm/server dev" "pnpm --filter @repohelm/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @repohelm/core build && pnpm --filter @repohelm/server build && pnpm --filter @repohelm/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @repohelm/core build && pnpm --filter @repohelm/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @repohelm/web typecheck
scripts.test:e2e: NO_PROXY=localhost,127.0.0.1 no_proxy=localhost,127.0.0.1 HTTP_PROXY= HTTPS_PROXY= http_proxy= https_proxy= playwright test
scripts.test:agent: pnpm predev && NO_PROXY=localhost,127.0.0.1 no_proxy=localhost,127.0.0.1 HTTP_PROXY= HTTPS_PROXY= http_proxy= https_proxy= playwright test -c playwright.agent.config.ts
scripts.test:agent:complex: pnpm predev && NO_PROXY=localhost,127.0.0.1 no_proxy=localhost,127.0.0.1 HTTP_PROXY= HTTPS_PROXY= http_proxy= https_proxy= playwright test -c playwright.agent.complex.config.ts
scripts.test:agent:toolset: pnpm predev && NO_PROXY=localhost,127.0.0.1 no_proxy=localhost,127.0.0.1 HTTP_PROXY= HTTPS_PROXY= http_proxy= https_proxy= playwright test -c playwright.agent.toolset.config.ts
scripts.test:agent:delegation: pnpm predev && NO_PROXY=localhost,127.0.0.1 no_proxy=localhost,127.0.0.1 HTTP_PROXY= HTTPS_PROXY= http_proxy= https_proxy= playwright test -c playwright.agent.delegation.config.ts
scripts.test:agent:recovery-knowledge: pnpm predev && NO_PROXY=localhost,127.0.0.1 no_proxy=localhost,127.0.0.1 HTTP_PROXY= HTTPS_PROXY= http_proxy= https_proxy= playwright test -c playwright.agent.recovery-knowledge.config.ts
scripts.test:all: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm test:e2e
